name: sub2api
desc: Sub2API is an open-source relay platform that unifies Claude, OpenAI, Gemini, and Antigravity subscriptions into a single endpoint. It supports account sharing…
descFull: Sub2API is an open-source relay platform that unifies Claude, OpenAI, Gemini, and Antigravity subscriptions into a single endpoint. It supports account sharing and cost-sharing, with seamless native tool compatibility.
